moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals: Spain vs Belgium
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-finals continue today with a clash between Spain and Belgium, as teams battle for a spot in the semi-finals.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Final day at the World Cup! Spain take on Belgium for a place in the semis. Who are you backing?

angles.name: UK Viewing
angles.copy: Catch Spain vs Belgium in the World Cup Quarter-Finals tonight! Live free on BBC iPlayer. Grab your snacks!

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 are reaching their thrilling climax this weekend, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals scheduled for Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Weekend Anticipation
angles.copy: It's FINALS weekend at Wimbledon! Who will lift the trophies at the All England Club?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The atmosphere in London is electric as Wimbledon's finals weekend gets underway. Strawberries and cream, anyone?

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed Underway
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, a celebration of motorsport and car culture, is in full swing and runs until Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Speed Thrills
angles.copy: Engines revving, tyres screeching! Goodwood Festival of Speed is delivering all the thrills this weekend.

angles.name: Car Culture
angles.copy: From classic beauties to futuristic concepts, the Goodwood Festival of Speed is a petrolhead's paradise. What's your dream car?

moments.title: My Chemical Romance at Wembley Stadium
moments.blurb: My Chemical Romance are playing two major UK headline shows at Wembley Stadium tonight and tomorrow as part of their 'Long Live The Black Parade Tour'.

angles.name: MCR Live
angles.copy: My Chemical Romance are taking over Wembley Stadium tonight! Who's ready for 'The Black Parade'?

angles.name: Emo Anthems
angles.copy: It's been a long wait, but My Chemical Romance are back in London! Expect all the emo anthems and singalongs.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds at Number 1 on the Official Singles Chart for a 16th non-consecutive week, becoming the longest-running UK Number 1 single by a British act of all time.

angles.name: Chart Record
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is now the longest-running British No.1 single ever. What a track!

angles.name: British Talent
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Sam Fender and Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is still at the top, smashing records and making UK chart history.

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Perrie Edwards!
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards celebrates her 33rd birthday today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Perrie's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 33rd birthday to the incredible Perrie Edwards! What's your favourite Little Mix track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday, Perrie Edwards! The Little Mix star turns 33 today. Still slaying those vocals!

moments.title: Happy 46th Birthday, Jessica Simpson!
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and TV personality Jessica Simpson turns 46 today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Jessica's B-day
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to the multi-talented Jessica Simpson! From pop star to reality TV queen, what's your favourite Jessica moment?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Celebrating Jessica Simpson's 46th birthday today! Still love 'I Wanna Love You Forever'.

moments.title: Happy 72nd Birthday, Neil Tennant!
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead vocalist of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Legend
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys! A true synth-pop pioneer.

angles.name: Pet Shop Boys
angles.copy: Iconic voice, timeless tunes! Wishing Neil Tennant a very Happy 72nd Birthday today.

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday, Mavis Staples!
moments.blurb: Legendary American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers, turns 87 today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the incredible Mavis Staples! A true icon of gospel and soul music.

angles.name: Music Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the legendary Mavis Staples! Her voice is pure gold.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Arlo Guthrie!
moments.blurb: American folk singer-songwriter Arlo Guthrie, famous for 'Alice's Restaurant Massacree', celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 10, 2026.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary folk singer Arlo Guthrie! 'Alice's Restaurant' is still a classic.

angles.name: Woodstock Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Arlo Guthrie, a true voice of his generation and Woodstock star!

moments.title: Escape to the Country Season 33 Premieres
moments.blurb: The 33rd season of the popular UK reality series 'Escape to the Country' premieres today, July 10, on BritBox in the US, helping city dwellers find their dream rural homes.

angles.name: Rural Dreams
angles.copy: Dreaming of a life in the countryside? The new season of 'Escape to the Country' starts today! What's your ideal rural retreat?

angles.name: Property Porn
angles.copy: Get ready for more gorgeous properties and idyllic locations as 'Escape to the Country' returns for its 33rd season!

moments.title: England vs Norway in World Cup Quarter-Finals
moments.blurb: England faces Norway in a highly anticipated FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Final match tomorrow, July 11, with a semi-final spot at stake.

angles.name: England Match Hype
angles.copy: Tomorrow, England takes on Norway in the World Cup Quarter-Finals! Can the Three Lions roar their way into the semis?

angles.name: National Support
angles.copy: Get ready, England fans! Big match tomorrow against Norway in the World Cup. Send your good luck messages!

moments.title: Good Vibrations Society Festival this weekend
moments.blurb: The Good Vibrations Society Festival, a woodland music and wellbeing festival in East Sussex, kicks off tomorrow, July 11, running until July 13.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Good vibes incoming! The Good Vibrations Society Festival starts tomorrow in East Sussex. Ready for a weekend of music and wellness?

angles.name: Weekend Escape
angles.copy: Looking for a chilled weekend? Good Vibrations Society Festival in East Sussex offers music, workshops, and nature. Sounds perfect!

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival at Alexandra Palace
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace's Kaleidoscope Festival returns tomorrow, July 11, for a day of music and arts with stunning London views.

angles.name: Palace Party
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Alexandra Palace tomorrow! Who's heading up the hill for music and those epic London views?

angles.name: London Festival
angles.copy: Tomorrow: Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally! Get ready for a day of amazing music and performances in one of London's best spots.

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar Season 2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix this Sunday, July 12, catching up with the cast after the pods.

angles.name: Reality TV Catch-up
angles.copy: More drama from the pods! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday. Who are you excited to catch up with?

angles.name: Post-Pod Life
angles.copy: What happens after the altar? Find out this Sunday as 'Love is Blind: UK' returns to Netflix to reveal all the post-pod developments!

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's most prestigious tournaments, begins its practice days on Sunday, July 12, at Royal Birkdale, with tournament play starting July 16.

angles.name: Golf Major
angles.copy: The Open Championship is almost here! Practice days begin Sunday at Royal Birkdale, leading up to the main event next week.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class golf! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale this Sunday for practice, with tournament play starting Thursday.

moments.title: Happy 63rd Birthday, Richard Marx!
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for 80s and 90s hits like 'Right Here Waiting', celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Balladeer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 63rd Birthday to the legendary Richard Marx! Still 'Right Here Waiting' for more of his tunes.

angles.name: Power Ballad King
angles.copy: Happy Birthday, Richard Marx! The power ballad king turns 63 on July 16. What's your favourite of his hits?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: Legendary Mexican-American guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his pioneering work in Latin rock, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! His guitar riffs are legendary.

angles.name: Latin Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! A true pioneer of Latin rock.
